prompt: What do you tell a colleague about the staff meeting last Monday?
prompt_task_text: What do you tell a colleague about the staff meeting last Monday?
answer: I did not understand why the meeting had been postponed again.

prompt: What do you say when the instructor asks why you were late to class?
prompt_task_text: What do you say when the instructor asks why you were late to class?
answer: The bus did not arrive on time this morning.

prompt: What do you say when your classmate asks about the group project?
prompt_task_text: What do you say when your classmate asks about the group project?
answer: I do not understand why he decided to quit the team.

prompt: What did the librarian ask about the overdue items you returned?
prompt_task_text: What did the librarian ask about the overdue items you returned?
answer: The librarian wanted to know if the fine was already paid.

prompt: What do you tell your friend about the local park?
prompt_task_text: What do you tell your friend about the local park?
answer: The park I visited had a lovely walking path.

prompt: What do you say when the pharmacist asks if you finished the prescription?
prompt_task_text: What do you say when the pharmacist asks if you finished the prescription?
answer: I did not finish the full course of medication.

prompt: What does the exchange student say when asked about the campus registration deadline?
prompt_task_text: What does the exchange student say when asked about the campus registration deadline?
answer: The exchange student did not know when the registration deadline was.

prompt: What do you say about the coffee shop that opened near campus?
prompt_task_text: What do you say about the coffee shop that opened near campus?
answer: The coffee shop that opened near campus serves great pastries.

prompt: What did the museum curator ask about the visiting school group?
prompt_task_text: What did the museum curator ask about the visiting school group?
answer: The museum curator asked if the group needed a guide.

prompt: What do you say about the repair service your landlord recommended?
prompt_task_text: What do you say about the repair service your landlord recommended?
answer: The repair service my landlord recommended has already been contacted.

prompt: What did the yoga instructor ask about your membership at the sports center?
prompt_task_text: What did the yoga instructor ask about your membership at the sports center?
answer: The yoga instructor inquired whether your membership plan still applied.

prompt: What do you say when your roommate asks about the grocery store hours?
prompt_task_text: What do you say when your roommate asks about the grocery store hours?
answer: I am not sure when the grocery store closes on Sundays.

prompt: What do you say when the dental receptionist asks if you received the appointment reminder?
prompt_task_text: What do you say when the dental receptionist asks if you received the appointment reminder?
answer: I did not receive any reminder about the appointment.

prompt: What did the hair salon receptionist ask about your appointment last Saturday?
prompt_task_text: What did the hair salon receptionist ask about your appointment last Saturday?
answer: The receptionist asked if I wanted to reschedule my appointment.

prompt: What did the community center coordinator ask about the pottery class schedule?
prompt_task_text: What did the community center coordinator ask about the pottery class schedule?
answer: The coordinator asked if the pottery class met on weekends.

prompt: What do you say when the delivery driver asks if the package arrived safely?
prompt_task_text: What do you say when the delivery driver asks if the package arrived safely?
answer: I did not receive any package at my door.

prompt: What do you say when the flight attendant asks if you ordered a special meal?
prompt_task_text: What do you say when the flight attendant asks if you ordered a special meal?
answer: I have not requested a special meal for this flight.

prompt: What did the internship supervisor ask about the project deadline?
prompt_task_text: What did the internship supervisor ask about the project deadline?
answer: The supervisor asked if the team finished the report early.

prompt: What do you say when the art gallery receptionist asks if you signed up for the guided tour?
prompt_task_text: What do you say when the art gallery receptionist asks if you signed up for the guided tour?
answer: I did not sign up for the guided tour.

prompt: What do you say when the bookstore clerk asks if you found the textbook you needed?
prompt_task_text: What do you say when the bookstore clerk asks if you found the textbook you needed?
answer: I did not find the textbook I needed.

prompt: What do you ask the campus clinic receptionist about your appointment?
prompt_task_text: What do you ask the campus clinic receptionist about your appointment?
answer: Can you tell me what time my appointment starts?

prompt: What do you ask the community center staff about the swimming class?
prompt_task_text: What do you ask the community center staff about the swimming class?
answer: Do you know if the swimming class is full?

prompt: What do you ask the campus cafe manager about the new loyalty program?
prompt_task_text: What do you ask the campus cafe manager about the new loyalty program?
answer: Can you remind me how the loyalty program works?

prompt: What do you ask the hiking trail ranger about the new route?
prompt_task_text: What do you ask the hiking trail ranger about the new route?
answer: Could you tell me how long the new trail takes?

prompt: What do you ask the yoga instructor about the community center class?
prompt_task_text: What do you ask the yoga instructor about the community center class?
answer: Do you know if the class starts at the same time?

prompt: What do you ask the store clerk about the art supplies at the local gallery shop?
prompt_task_text: What do you ask the store clerk about the art supplies at the local gallery shop?
answer: Can you remind me where the watercolor sets are displayed?

prompt: What does the young architect ask when visiting the post office about the permit?
prompt_task_text: What does the young architect ask when visiting the post office about the permit?
answer: Do you know where I can submit the permit application?

prompt: What do you ask the post office clerk about picking up your package?
prompt_task_text: What do you ask the post office clerk about picking up your package?
answer: Do you know where I can pick up my package?

prompt: What do you ask the botanical garden guide about the weekend tours?
prompt_task_text: What do you ask the botanical garden guide about the weekend tours?
answer: Can you remind me when the weekend tours usually start?

prompt: What did the project supervisor say about the report your team submitted?
prompt_task_text: What did the project supervisor say about the report your team submitted?
answer: The report your team submitted had already been reviewed by Friday.

prompt: What do you tell your friend about the community center you visited?
prompt_task_text: What do you tell your friend about the community center you visited?
answer: The community center I visited offers free fitness classes on weekends.

prompt: What did the clothing store clerk ask about the item you were returning?
prompt_task_text: What did the clothing store clerk ask about the item you were returning?
answer: The store clerk asked if the jacket still had its original tags.

prompt: What did the post office clerk ask about the package you wanted to send?
prompt_task_text: What did the post office clerk ask about the package you wanted to send?
answer: The post office clerk inquired whether the package contained any fragile items.

prompt: What did the volunteer coordinator ask about the event supplies you had ordered?
prompt_task_text: What did the volunteer coordinator ask about the event supplies you had ordered?
answer: The volunteer coordinator inquired whether the supplies had been delivered on time.

prompt: What did the clothing store manager ask about the returned jacket?
prompt_task_text: What did the clothing store manager ask about the returned jacket?
answer: The manager inquired when the jacket had been purchased.

prompt: What did you find out about which seat had been reserved for the guest speaker?
prompt_task_text: What did you find out about which seat had been reserved for the guest speaker?
answer: I just found out which seat had been reserved for the guest speaker.

prompt: What did you say when your study partner asked about where the group decided to meet?
prompt_task_text: What did you say when your study partner asked about where the group decided to meet?
answer: I have no idea where the group decided to meet tonight.

prompt: What did you find out about the trail closure at the nature reserve?
prompt_task_text: What did you find out about the trail closure at the nature reserve?
answer: I found out when the hiking trail would reopen to visitors.

prompt: What did you need to find out from the registrar about your course enrollment?
prompt_task_text: What did you need to find out from the registrar about your course enrollment?
answer: I needed to find out which courses still had open spots available.

prompt: What did you ask the project supervisor about the internship interview schedule?
prompt_task_text: What did you ask the project supervisor about the internship interview schedule?
answer: I asked whether the interview schedule was posted on the board.

prompt: What did you find out about the exchange program at the registrar's office?
prompt_task_text: What did you find out about the exchange program at the registrar's office?
answer: I just found out which program had been recommended by the advisor.

prompt: What did you wonder about the community theater audition results?
prompt_task_text: What did you wonder about the community theater audition results?
answer: I wondered who had been chosen as the lead actor for the play.

prompt: What did the pharmacy clerk say about your prescription being ready?
prompt_task_text: What did the pharmacy clerk say about your prescription being ready?
answer: The pharmacy clerk did not know if my prescription was ready.

prompt: What did the restaurant waiter say when you asked about the soup of the day?
prompt_task_text: What did the restaurant waiter say when you asked about the soup of the day?
answer: The waiter did not know what the soup of the day was.

prompt: What does the exchange student say about the home repair shop near campus?
prompt_task_text: What does the exchange student say about the home repair shop near campus?
answer: The repair shop on Oak Street carries a wide range of tools.

prompt: What did the new intern say about the training session she missed?
prompt_task_text: What did the new intern say about the training session she missed?
answer: The new intern did not know where the training session was held.

prompt: What did the student tell her study partner about the biology exam results?
prompt_task_text: What did the student tell her study partner about the biology exam results?
answer: The student did not understand why her exam score had changed.

prompt: What do you say when the farmers market vendor asks if you reserved a weekly box?
prompt_task_text: What do you say when the farmers market vendor asks if you reserved a weekly box?
answer: I did not sign up for the weekly produce box.

prompt: What do you say when the registrar asks if you submitted your enrollment form?
prompt_task_text: What do you say when the registrar asks if you submitted your enrollment form?
